poems.title: The Blue Boat
lines: A blue boat bobs on the bright sea,
With blossoms blowing wild and free.
Blink your eyes and you will see,
A blue bird landing on a tree!

poems.title: Clapping Clowns
lines: Clapping clowns in a clever show,
Climbing clouds up high and low.
Clear the stage, and clap along,
A clumsy clown sings a clever song!

poems.title: Frog on a Log
lines: A frog sat on a fresh green log,
In a frosty morning full of fog.
He leapt from the log with a free big jump,
And landed right on a friendly stump!

poems.title: The Shiny Shell
lines: I found a shiny shell by the shore,
Its shimmer and shine I could not ignore.
I showed it to my sheep named Shaw,
The shiniest shell I ever saw!

poems.title: Thinking Thoughts
lines: I think and think about things all day,
Three thousand thoughts come out to play.
The thunder thinks it should be loud,
But thoughtful rain brings a thankful cloud!

poems.title: Sleeping Sloth
lines: A sleepy sloth slides down slow,
He slips and slides through sleet and snow.
He slumbers deeply, slick and still,
On a sloping, slippery hill!

poems.title: The Brave Dragon
lines: A dragon dreams of dripping rain,
He drifts through dreams again and again.
He draws great dragons on the wall,
And drones his droopy dragon call!

poems.title: Snowflakes
lines: Snowflakes sneak down from the sky,
They snuggle on the snowy hillside high.
The snail beneath says with a sniff,
I snapped at a snowflake off the cliff!

poems.title: The Bright Star
lines: A strong bright star in the streaky night,
Stretches its arms to share its light.
Strange streets below stand straight and still,
As streams of starlight flow until...

poems.title: Spring Song
lines: Spring has sprung with a sprinkle of rain,
Sprouting flowers spring up again.
Sprites and sprouts dance in the breeze,
Spreading springtime through the trees!

poems.title: Cheerful Cherries
lines: Cherries are cheerful, round and red,
I chomp on cherries before I go to bed.
The chickens chase them down the hill,
And cheer for cherries with a trill!

poems.title: Glowing Glowworms
lines: Glowing glowworms light the night,
Their gleaming glow is such a sight.
They glide and glitter, glad and free,
Glowing gloriously under the tree!

poems.title: Pretty Princess
lines: A pretty princess in a proud tall tower,
Pressed a purple bloom into a flower.
She pranced and prayed for a prince to come,
And practiced reading till the day was done!

poems.title: The Trumpet Player
lines: A trumpet trills a tricky tune,
Trailing notes past the treetops to the moon.
A trio of frogs try to trot along,
Trading croaks for a trumpet song!

poems.title: The Clever Crow
lines: A crafty crow cried out one day,
I'll cross the creek and find my way!
With crisscrossed wings he crept along,
And croaked a crunchy morning song!
